overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a robed character ascending through a gothic castle's interior staircases and observatories at night. The character transitions from enclosed stone corridors to an open-air balcony with astronomical equipment, and finally reaches an upper chamber containing a large mechanical orrery.

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a narrow stone spiral staircase within a gothic castle tower. Warm light from medieval wall lanterns illuminates the rough stone walls as the character approaches a gothic archway at the top of the stairs.

segments.scene_description: The character enters a cozy room dominated by a large stone fireplace with a crackling fire. After passing a wooden bench, the character exits through a doorway revealing a wooden spiral staircase leading further upward.

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wooden spiral staircase with dark worn steps and railings. Shuttered windows line the stone walls as the character climbs toward an opening where moonlight begins to filter in.

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an open-air observatory balcony under a cloudy night sky. A large brass telescope stands at the center while the illuminated gothic towers of the castle rise in the background. An owl perches on the railing as the character circles the deck admiring the view.

agents.ego_description: climbing the final section of wooden stairs toward the upper observatory

entered.detail: continuation of the wooden spiral stairs leading higher

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the outdoor balcony and re-enters the enclosed wooden staircase, ascending the final flight toward a stone archway leading to the upper level.

segments.scene_description: The character enters an open-air observatory chamber with tall stone columns and a marble floor. At the center stands a large mechanical orrery with rotating brass rings and planetary spheres. The character approaches the intricate device, looking up at the moving components against the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous ascent through a gothic castle, transitioning from enclosed stone corridors to an open-air observatory and finally into a celestial chamber. It begins by climbing a narrow stone spiral staircase lit by warm wall lanterns before passing through a gothic archway into a cozy room centered around a crackling fireplace. As the character exits this room, the environment shifts to a wooden spiral staircase where the warm interior light gradually gives way to cool moonlight filtering through shuttered windows. The camera then emerges onto an open-air balcony featuring a large brass telescope and a perching owl under a cloudy night sky, before retreating back into the wooden stairs for a final climb. The journey concludes as the character enters a grand observatory chamber with marble floors and tall columns, moving toward a massive mechanical orrery with rotating brass rings set against the dark sky.
